name: &BThe Temple of the Lizardmen&n
description:
You are standing on the Lizardmens ground, a very unpleasant place, it has
a terrible scent and it seems to be comming from the walls, your boots are sunken
in a grossy, thick mud, that is visible every part. Surelly only a Lizardman
could live here.
   The exit to the Temple Street is to the North.
